name: Zhiyun Parabolic Softbox 60D
description: The Parabolic Softbox 60D from Zhiyun is a 19.3" parabolic softbox designed for use with G60 & X100 lights and Bowens mount fixtures.

features.Key Features:: For G60 & X100 LED Lights | 19.3" Diameter Parabolic Softbox | 16-Sided Hexadecagon Shape | Bowens S-Type Speed Ring | Removable Inner Baffle, Front Diffuser | Silver Interior | Includes Fabric Grid | Includes Carrying Case
features.What’s in the box?: Zhiyun Parabolic Softbox 60D (19.3") | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
